case_title: THOMAS A MARTINEZ VS. PEARL PROPERTIES ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, THOMAS A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEARL PROPERTIES KOHI, MARK $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,200.00, DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,409.81, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANTS HAVE ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF'S. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,306.02 FILED BY MARTINEZ, THOMAS A AS TO DEFENDANT PEARL PROPERTIES KOHI, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED SEP-30-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEARL PROPERTIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEARL PROPERTIES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED SEP-30-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOHI, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT PEARL PROP. WAS REPRESENTED BY MARK SHAHIN KHAN--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
